description_long: This is a pair of elegant high-heeled peep-toe shoes featuring a striking black and white color scheme. The shoes have a glossy black toe cap and heel, contrasted by a white upper section that wraps around the foot. A small decorative buckle adorns the front of each shoe, adding a touch of sophistication. The stiletto heels are tall and slender, giving the shoes a refined and formal appearance. The interior is lined with a dark material, and the insole is branded with the word 'ESPRIT' in white lettering. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for formal or upscale urban settings.
description: A pair of black and white high-heeled peep-toe shoes with decorative buckles and stiletto heels, featuring a sleek and glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the peep-toe opening, decorative buckles, and the 'ESPRIT' branding on the insole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall stiletto heel, the smooth curve of the white upper, and the black toe cap.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the slender stiletto heels and the back curve of the shoes.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying both the peep-toe front and the side profile, emphasizing the contrast between the black and white sections.
attribute_logo: White 'ESPRIT' text logo on the insole
